Whip In Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-32 h-32 md:w-64 md:h-64" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Muted background frame -->
<rect fill="none" height="16" opacity="0.2" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with 'Whip In' animation -->
<rect fill="currentColor" height="16" rx="1" width="16" x="4" y="4">
<animatetransform attributename="transform" calcmode="spline" dur="1.2s" keysplines="0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1; 0.4, 0, 0.6, 1; 0, 0, 1, 1" keytimes="0; 0.15; 0.25; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" type="translate" values="-24 0; 0 0; 0.5 0; 0 0">
</animatetransform>
<animate attributename="opacity" dur="1.2s" keytimes="0; 0.1; 0.9; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" values="0; 1; 1; 0">
</animate>
</rect>
</svg>
Drop In Animation Icon:
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="w-full h-full">
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2" fill="none"></rect>
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" fill="currentColor">
        <animate attributeName="y" values="-24; 4; 4; 4" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0; 1; 1; 0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
      </rect>
    </svg>

      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2" fill="none"></rect>
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" fill="currentColor">
        <animate attributeName="y" values="-20; 4; -2; 4; 2; 4" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0; 1; 1; 1; 1; 1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>

Stretch Horizontal Animation Icon (Fixed:
<svg class="w-64 h-64" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Muted background frame -->
<rect fill="none" height="16" opacity="0.2" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with stretch animation -->
<g transform-origin="center">
<rect fill="currentColor" height="16" rx="1" width="4" x="10" y="4">
<animatetransform additive="replace" attributename="transform" dur="2s" repeatcount="indefinite" type="scale" values="1 1; 4 1; 4 1; 1 1">
</animatetransform>
</rect>
</g>
</svg>

      <g transform-origin="center">

Spin In Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-64 h-64" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Background frame with low opacity -->
<rect fill="none" height="16" opacity="0.1" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Animated primary element -->
<g transform-origin="center">
<rect fill="currentColor" height="16" rx="2" width="16" x="4" y="4">
<!-- Spin In Animation: Rotation and Scaling -->
<animatetransform attributename="transform" dur="2s" from="0" repeatcount="indefinite" to="360" type="rotate">
</animatetransform>
<animatetransform additive="sum" attributename="transform" dur="2s" keytimes="0;0.2;0.8;1" repeatcount="indefinite" type="scale" values="0;1;1;0">
</animatetransform>
</rect>
</g>
</svg>
Stretch Horizontal Animation Icon:

      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2" fill="none"></rect>
      <g transform-origin="center">
        <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" fill="currentColor">
          <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="scale" values="0 1; 1 1; 1 1; 0 1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animateTransform>

Blur Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-64 h-64" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<defs>
<filter height="200%" id="blurEffect" width="200%" x="-50%" y="-50%">
<fegaussianblur in="SourceGraphic" stddeviation="4">
<animate attributename="stdDeviation" dur="3s" keytimes="0; 0.3; 0.7; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" values="4;0;0;4"></animate>
</fegaussianblur>
</filter>
</defs>
<!-- Muted background frame -->
<rect fill="none" height="16" opacity="0.2" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with blur animation -->
<rect fill="currentColor" filter="url(#blurEffect)" height="10" rx="1.5" width="10" x="7" y="7">
<animate attributename="opacity" dur="3s" keytimes="0; 0.3; 0.7; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" values="0;1;1;0"></animate>
</rect>
<!-- Sharp center element for focus -->
<rect fill="currentColor" height="4" rx="0.5" width="4" x="10" y="10">
<animate attributename="opacity" dur="3s" keytimes="0; 0.3; 0.7; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" values="0;0.8;0.8;0"></animate>
</rect>
</svg>
Grow Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-full h-full" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<rect class="opacity-20" fill="none" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with 'Grow' animation -->
<rect fill="currentColor" height="16" rx="2" width="16" x="4" y="4">
<animatetransform additive="replace" attributename="transform" calcmode="spline" dur="2.5s" keysplines="0.4 0 0.2 1; 0.4 0 0.2 1" repeatcount="indefinite" transform-origin="center" type="scale" values="0.4; 1; 0.4"></animatetransform>
<animate attributename="opacity" dur="2.5s" repeatcount="indefinite" values="0.5; 1; 0.5"></animate>
</rect>
</svg>

</rect>

      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2" fill="none"></rect>

Blur Animation Icon:
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="w-full h-full">
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2" fill="none"></rect>
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" fill="currentColor">
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1;1;0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="0">
          <animate attributeName="stdDeviation" values="4;0;0;4" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
        </feGaussianBlur>
      </rect>
      <filter id="blurFilter">
        <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="3">
          <animate attributeName="stdDeviation" values="4;0;0;4" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
        </feGaussianBlur>
      </filter>
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" fill="currentColor" filter="url(#blurFilter)">
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1;1;0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
      </rect>
    </svg>
Swivel Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-64 h-64" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Muted background frame -->
<rect fill="none" height="16" opacity="0.2" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with 'Swivel' animation (swinging door) -->
<g transform-origin="4 12">
<rect fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.9" height="16" rx="1" width="16" x="4" y="4">
<animatetransform attributename="transform" calcmode="spline" dur="2s" keysplines="0.4 0 0.2 1; 0.4 0 0.2 1" repeatcount="indefinite" type="scale" values="1 1; 0.1 1; 1 1"></animatetransform>
</rect>
</g>
</svg>
Unfold Vertical Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-full h-full" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Muted background frame -->
<rect class="opacity-20" fill="none" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with Unfold Vertical animation -->
<g transform="translate(4, 4)">
<rect fill="currentColor" height="16" rx="2" width="16">
<animatetransform additive="replace" attributename="transform" begin="0s" dur="1.5s" from="1 0" keytimes="0; 0.5; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" to="1 1" type="scale" values="1 0; 1 1; 1 1"></animatetransform>
</rect>
</g>
</svg>
Flip Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-full h-full" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Muted background frame -->
<rect fill="none" height="16" opacity="0.2" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with 3D flip animation -->
<g class="animate-flip">
<rect fill="currentColor" height="12" rx="1.5" width="12" x="6" y="6"></rect>
<!-- Optional detail to show orientation during flip -->
<rect fill="black" height="8" opacity="0.1" width="2" x="8" y="8"></rect>
</g>
</svg>
Bounce In Animation Icon (Fixed):
<svg class="w-full h-full" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<!-- Muted background frame -->
<rect class="opacity-20" fill="none" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" width="16" x="4" y="4"></rect>
<!-- Primary active element with Bounce In animation -->
<rect fill="currentColor" height="12" rx="1.5" width="12" x="6" y="6">
<animate attributename="y" calcmode="spline" dur="1.2s" keysplines="0.42 0 1 1; 0 0 0.58 1; 0.42 0 1 1; 0 0 0.58 1; 0.42 0 1 1" keytimes="0; 0.4; 0.6; 0.8; 0.9; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" values="-15; 6; 2; 6; 4; 6"></animate>
<animate attributename="opacity" dur="1.2s" keytimes="0; 0.2; 0.4; 0.6; 0.8; 1" repeatcount="indefinite" values="0; 1; 1; 1; 1; 1"></animate>
</rect>
<!-- Static floor line to define the 'ground' visually -->
<line class="opacity-10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" x1="4" x2="20" y1="18" y2="18"></line>
</svg>
Unfold Vertical Animation Icon:
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="w-full h-full">
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2" fill="none"></rect>
      <g transform-origin="top">
        <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2" fill="currentColor">
          <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="scale" values="1 0; 1 1; 1 1; 1 0" dur="2.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animateTransform>
        </rect>
      </g>
    </svg>
